title: Pan-Seared Italian Egg with Yuzu
description: A keto-friendly twist on a classic Italian dish, featuring a tender egg and a tangy yuzu sauce.
instructions: 1. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the melted butter to the skillet and swirl it around.
3. Crack the eggs into the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the whites are set.
4. Flip the eggs over and cook for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute.
5. Remove the eggs from the skillet and place them on a plate.
6. Squeeze the yuzu juice over the eggs and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
7. Season with flaky sea salt to taste.
